sentences.arabic: يُحِبُّ الشَّبَابُ اسْتِخْدَامَ مَوَاقِعِ التَّوَاصُلِ الِاجْتِمَاعِيِّ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ.
sentences.translation: Mladi vole svakodnevno koristiti društvene mreže.
sentences.translationEn: Young people love using social media sites every day.

sentences.arabic: يَنْشُرُ الْمُسْتَخْدِمُونَ صُوَرَهُمْ وَيُشَارِكُونَ أَخْبَارَهُمْ مَعَ الْأَصْدِقَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Korisnici objavljuju svoje fotografije i dijele svoje vijesti s prijateljima.
sentences.translationEn: Users post their photos and share their news with friends.

sentences.arabic: تُسَاعِدُ هَذِهِ الْمِنَصَّاتُ فِي التَّعَرُّفِ عَلَى ثَقَافَاتٍ جَدِيدَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Ove platforme pomažu u upoznavanju novih kultura.
sentences.translationEn: These platforms help in getting to know new cultures.
